_comment: Keel product-string overrides. Applied via patches/0001-keel-branding.patch and the build-time substitutions in scripts/apply-branding.sh. Internal identifiers (channel names, mojo interfaces, scheme names, profile dir on disk) are intentionally NOT renamed to avoid making rebases harder.

product.name: Keel
product.copyright: Built on Brave, which is built on Chromium. See about://credits.
product.tagline: A calm browser for deep work.

do_not_rename._comment: Things we DO NOT touch. Renaming these makes rebases painful and risks breaking the Brave update channel.
do_not_rename.rationale: Keep upstream identifiers so Brave's updater, mojo IPC, profile migrations, and Safe Browsing component updates keep working unchanged.
